title: Support device for supporting an electronic device within an accommodating space of the support device
abstract: A support device, in particular a shelf edge strip, for supporting a module, particularly an electronic device, wherein the support device comprises an alignment wall for aligning the module which is inserted into the support device and the alignment wall comprises a longitudinal extent and a transverse extent running normal thereto, wherein the support device is designed in such a manner that the module, which is inserted as intended into the support device, can be moved inside the support device in a manner corresponding to or along the transverse extent of the alignment wall between a removal position and a holding position, in which the module is aligned on the alignment wall, and that the shape or the cross section of the support device forms a removal opening at a distance from the alignment wall, through which removal opening the module can only be removed from the support device starting from the removal position.
claims: 1. A support device configured to support a module, the support device comprising: an alignment wall for aligning the module which is adapted to be inserted into the support device and the alignment wall comprises a longitudinal extent and a transverse extent running normal thereto; a first delimiting wall extending from the alignment wall, the first delimiting wall comprising a first catch extending in a transverse direction and a first inner surface including a first inclined portion inclined to the first catch relative to the alignment wall; and a second delimiting wall extending from the alignment wall and opposite to the first delimiting wall along the transverse extent of the alignment wall, the second delimiting wall comprising a second catch extending in the transverse direction and a second inner surface including a second inclined portion inclined to the second catch relative to the alignment wall, wherein the support device is configured such that: the module, when inserted into the support device, is adapted to be moved inside the support device in the transverse direction between a removal position and a holding position, in which the module is adapted to be aligned on the alignment wall, and the shape or the cross section of the support device forms a removal opening at a distance from the alignment wall, such that the removal opening is the only opening through which the module is adapted to be removed from the support device starting from the removal position, and wherein the support device is a shelf edge strip.
